description: You are a Health Informatics Specialist merging patient registries from two recently consolidated hospital networks (CLINIC_A_PATIENTS and CLINIC_B_PATIENTS) in the 'hie_admin' schema (Password: Health2024). Create a Master Patient Index (MPI) by developing a view named PROBABLE_MATCHES_VW that joins the tables based on exact matches for 'date_of_birth' and 'gender', fuzzy first and last name matches (UTL_MATCH.JARO_WINKLER_SIMILARITY >= 85), and fuzzy SSN matches (UTL_MATCH.EDIT_DISTANCE <= 2). The view must return a_pat_id, b_pat_id, a_first_name, b_first_name, fname_score, a_ssn, b_ssn, and ssn_distance. Additionally, create a sequence named MPI_SEQ starting at 1000000 (increment 1) and a table named MPI_CROSSWALK with columns golden_mpi_id (NUMBER), clinic_a_pat_id (VARCHAR2), and clinic_b_pat_id (VARCHAR2). Populate MPI_CROSSWALK with the results from the view using MPI_SEQ.NEXTVAL for the golden_mpi_id and export the table to /home/ga/Documents/exports/mpi_crosswalk.csv.
